pages.text: Traveling with this in hand is a must for any adventurer.$(br2)As I travel, the map automatically fills up with markings telling me what biome is where.

I can even mark waypoints and markers to key locations like my base.$(br2)$(italics)$(#a84b0f)Craft two existing atlases to add up their markers. Craft an empty one with an existing one to duplicate the latter.$(br2)$(bold)Duplicate atlases automatically synchronize their contents, keep a spare one at home if you fear losing yours!
